title: Twisha Sharma death case: Bhopal court rejects lawyer-husband's bail plea in dowry harassment case
description: A Bhopal court on Monday rejected the anticipatory bail plea filed by lawyer Samarth Singh, who has been accused of physically and mentally abusing his wife Twisha Sharma, recently found dead at their residence. Noida-based Sharma had married Singh, a Bhopal-based lawyer, five months ago after meeting through a dating app. Sharma's family has blamed her in-laws for the death, accusing them of persistent domestic violence and harassment. They have demanded a second post-mortem to ascertain t
